get.description: List public link groups for themes, sorted by group priority.
List public links for themes, with optional keyword search and group filtering.

parameters.description: Keyword used to search link display names, descriptions, and URLs.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Metadata name of the link group to filter by.
parameters.name: group

get.description: Return the total number of non-deleted links.
Return a random selection of public links.

parameters.description: Maximum number of random links to return. Must be between 1 and 100.
parameters.name: maxSize

post.description: Update link group priorities according to the provided ordered group names.

requestBody.description: Ordered metadata names of link groups.

delete.description: Delete a link group and optionally delete the links assigned to it.

parameters.description: Metadata name of the link group to delete.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Whether to delete links in the group; when false, links become ungrouped.
parameters.name: deleteLinks

get.description: List links for the console, with optional keyword search and group filtering.

parameters.description: Keyword used to search link display names, descriptions, and URLs.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Metadata name of the link group to filter by.
parameters.name: groupName

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Fetch title, description, favicon, and preview image metadata from a website URL.

parameters.description: Absolute HTTP or HTTPS URL to inspect.
parameters.name: url

post.description: Update link priorities according to the provided ordered link names.
Refresh RSS or Atom items for all configured feed URLs on an enabled link.
Apply RSS item retention cleanup and compact the embedded feed cache.

get.description: Discover RSS or Atom feed URLs from a link website URL.

parameters.description: Absolute HTTP or HTTPS website URL to inspect.
parameters.name: url

get.description: List cached RSS or Atom feed items with cursor pagination.

parameters.description: Filter items by link metadata name.
parameters.name: linkName

parameters.description: Filter items by current link group metadata name.
parameters.name: groupName

parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Mark a cached RSS or Atom feed item as favorite or not favorite.
Mark a cached RSS or Atom feed item as read or unread.
Mark a cached RSS or Atom feed item as read-later or not read-later.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

Link.description: Link extension that represents one website entry displayed by the Links plugin.

description.description: Description discovered from the website meta description.

icon.description: Icon URL discovered from the website favicon metadata.

image.description: Preview image URL discovered from Open Graph metadata.

title.description: Title discovered from the website document.

LinkDetailDTO.description: Metadata discovered from a remote website URL.

LinkGroup.description: Link group extension that groups links for display and sorting.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

displayName.description: Human-readable name displayed for the link group.

links.description: Deprecated names of links below this group; use Link.spec.groupName instead.

items.description: Deprecated names of links below this group; use Link.spec.groupName instead.

priority.description: Sort order of the link group; lower values appear earlier.

LinkGroupSpec.description: Configurable fields of a link group.

links.description: Links that belong to this group when the API response includes grouped links.

LinkGroupVo.description: Public view of a link group returned by theme-facing APIs and finder APIs.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

description.description: Short text that introduces the linked website.

displayName.description: Human-readable name displayed for the link.

groupName.description: Metadata name of the LinkGroup that this link belongs to.

logo.description: Logo or icon URL displayed with the link.

priority.description: Sort order of the link; lower values appear earlier.

url.description: Absolute URL that the link points to.

LinkVo.description: Public view of a link returned by theme-facing APIs and finder APIs.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

generateName.description: The name field will be generated automatically according to the given generateName field

version.description: Current version of the Extension. It will be bumped up every update.

etag.description: ETag returned by this feed server for conditional requests.

failureCount.description: Number of consecutive refresh failures for this feed URL.

itemCount.description: Number of cached feed items for this feed URL.

lastError.description: Last refresh failure message for this feed URL.

lastFetchedAt.description: Last time this feed URL refresh was attempted.

lastModified.description: Last-Modified value returned by this feed server.

lastSuccessAt.description: Last time this feed URL refresh completed successfully.

latestPublishedAt.description: Latest feed item publication time observed for this feed URL.

url.description: Configured feed URL this status belongs to.

RssFeedStatus.description: Observed RSS or Atom refresh state for one configured feed URL.

enabled.description: Whether RSS or Atom tracking is enabled for this link.

feedUrls.description: Absolute HTTP or HTTPS URLs of the RSS or Atom feeds.

items.description: Absolute HTTP or HTTPS URLs of the RSS or Atom feeds.

RssSpec.description: RSS or Atom feed tracking settings.

failureCount.description: Number of consecutive feed refresh failures.

feeds.description: Observed refresh state for each configured feed URL.

itemCount.description: Number of cached feed items for this link.

lastFetchedAt.description: Last time a feed refresh was attempted.

lastSuccessAt.description: Last time a feed refresh completed successfully.

latestPublishedAt.description: Latest feed item publication time observed for this link.

RssStatus.description: Observed RSS or Atom feed refresh state.

names.description: Ordered metadata names; each item is assigned a priority matching its position.
